steps.title: Identify the temporal context
steps.content: The phrase “Each night” combined with the present-tense verbs in the surrounding sentences (“is bathed,” “is the Árbol de la Sidra”) tells us that we're describing a recurring, present-time action.

steps.title: Select the required verb form
steps.content: Simple present is the required verb form. Choice B “illuminates” is simple present. The other choices use future (A), conditional (C), or past (D) tense. That matches choice B — B is correct.
